programmes.show_description: Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of party anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
Danger! High Voltage! Prepare to go Bonkers with 30 of the silliest songs of the decade, including Cha Cha Slide, The Ketchup Song & My Humps. Warning: contains the Crazy Frog!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
Mark Goodier's choice selection of the 275 UK number 1s of the 00s. 13 songs that defined each year of the decade, starting with Westlife in 2000 & ending with Gaga in 2009.
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
Songs from the 00s that you really like, but are a bit too embarrassed to admit? If that's the case then Pat Sharp urges you to have a little less shame in your musical game!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
From secret glances of love in the classroom to a slow dance at the school disco. Not only were some of these pop pin ups, they also made the soundtrack to young love!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of party anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
Can you believe that 1997 delivered so many huge movie hits? Top songs from Trainspotting, Men In Black, Spice World, Evita & more!
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
The 80s & 90s were the golden decades for movie songs - but there were still a few in the 00s - some well remembered, and some not! Pat Sharp has found 25 - grab that popcorn.
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
Get the tissues ready for 20 box office ballads! Starting in the 90's with a classic from the blockbuster Ghost through to Take That's epic Stardust anthem in the 00s!
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
Bruno Brookes with the soundtrack of a decade - literally - the biggest UK movie songs of the 90s. Expect 007, Austin Powers, Romeo & Juliet, Robin Hood and those Men In Black!
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
Can you believe that 1994 delivered so many huge movie hits? Top songs from The Lion King, The Three Musketeers, Four Weddings, Reality Bites & more!
Ditch the chocolate, grab the popcorn & relive the biggest movies of the 90s & 00s. Packed with action, romance & big thrills, these big screen soundtracks that defined an era!
The 80s & 90s were the golden decades for movie songs - but there were still a few in the 00s - some well remembered, and some not! Here are 25, including 3 Bond themes.
3 decades of classic Bond themes from the 80s to the 00s - starring Roger Moore, Timothy Dalton, Pierce Brosnan & Daniel Craig.
It's where Harry Meets Sally & Robin Hood shares TV time with Godzilla, Batman & Austin Powers! Time to belt out some the biggest tunes ever seen in the movies.
